raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX I took a XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX yellow cab. The total fare was {$29.00}, however I was charged {$55.00} on my credit card statement. I provided BARCLAYS BANK with the receipt for {$29.00}. The receipt that I was given by the driver had the incorrect year on it. ( XXXX instead of XXXX. ) BARCLAYS BANK denied my claim.
